name: Equinox
description: Equinox rises from the edge of day and night. Her Day form offers offensive support while her Night form offers defensive support. She thrives between realms.
passiveDescription: |PERCENT|% of Health Orbs are converted into Energy, and |PERCENT|% of Energy Orbs are converted into Health.

abilities.name: Metamorphosis
abilities.description: Switch forms, temporarily gaining bonus Shields and Armor in Night-Form, or bonus Damage and Speed in Day-Form.

abilities.name: Rest & Rage
abilities.description: In Night-Form, targets are put to sleep. In Day-Form, targets become more vulnerable to damage.

abilities.name: Pacify & Provoke
abilities.description: In Night-Form, reduces damage inflicted by nearby enemies. In Day-Form, increases Ability Strength of nearby allies.

abilities.name: Mend & Maim
abilities.description: In Night-Form, allies' Shields are replenished with each nearby enemy killed. In Day-Form, enemies are inflicted with <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Status Effect. Deactivate while in Night-Form to restore Health and Shields for Equinox and allies. Deactivate while in Day-Form to cast a wave of slashing force.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Equinox rises from the edge of day and night. Her Day form offers offensive support while her Night form offers defensive support. She thrives between realms.

components.name: Day Aspect
components.description: Day Aspect of the Equinox Warframe.

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Night Aspect
components.description: Night Aspect of the Equinox Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed ammo pools not being shared properly across NPCs (Specters, Wukong’s Clone, Excalibur Umbra on Transference, and Equinox’s other half while using the Duality Augment Mod). 
Fixed Equinox’s other half from her Duality Augment Mod using the player’s Archgun instead of their Primary/Secondary/Melee weapon from their loadout. 
Fixed script error with Equinox’s Metamorphosis.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.7
patchlogs.fixes:
Equinox’s Mend
Fixed the Equinox & Wukong Prime Pack description text box going off screen when viewing it in Varzia’s menu.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Equinox (Saturn to Uranus)
Reduced the Equinox Specter’s level from 30 to 25.
Equinox’s split form while using the Duality Augment Mod will now retrieve ammo while active.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.changes: Fixed an FX leak if killed during Equinox Prime’s Metamorphosis.

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Equinox’s Maim being able to chain stagger Eximus units with Overguard active.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the hoops attached to the waist of base Equinox Skin clipping through the leg when equipped on Equinox prime.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Update 30
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Melee Guidance not being affected by Aura Strength Mods. This was causing Ash’s Blade Storm clones (also likely Mirage & Equinox clones) to give you temporary Melee Combo Duration buffs from their auras.

patchlogs.name: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack: Hotfix 29.10.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Equinox’s Mend & Maim.

patchlogs.name: Octavia Prime: Hotfix 29.9.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Replaced Arbiters of Hexis Sacrifice of Equinox Prime Neuroptics with Atlas Prime Systems
Replaced Red Veil Sacrifice of Equinox Prime Systems with Ivara Prime Chassis.
Replaced Steel Meridian Sacrifice of Equinox Prime Neuroptics with Nezha Prime Neuroptics.

patchlogs.name: Octavia Prime: Update 29.9.0
patchlogs.changes:
Replaced Arbiters of Hexis Sacrifice of Equinox Prime Neuroptics with Atlas Prime Systems
Replaced Red Veil Sacrifice of Equinox Prime Systems with Ivara Prime Chassis.
Replaced Steel Meridian Sacrifice of Equinox Prime Neuroptics with Nezha Prime Neuroptics.

patchlogs.name: Orphix Venom: Hotfix 29.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash associated with Equinox abilities on Orphix Venom.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.6.0: Orphix Venom!
patchlogs.fixes: Vazarin Dash, Trinity’s Blessing, Equinox's Mend, Rejuvenate Aura, and Arcane Pulse no longer heal Necramechs. Out of 21 sources of healing, these five slipped through.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a ‘None’ option erroneously appearing as an Equinox Skin.
Fixed script error related to Equinox’s Rest & Rage.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Nezha Prime: 29.3.0 + 29.3.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Equinox’s Duality Specter not using your Secondary weapon if you don’t have a Primary weapon in your loadout.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29
patchlogs.fixes: Similarly to Equinox, a toggle is available in the Arsenal to see Xaku in their “The Vast Untime” form.

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Hotfix 28.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error at End of Mission when using Equinox.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes:
Equinox 
Notes: Similar to Equinox, very hard to balance for this since it’s based on damage dealt.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Galvanik Shoulder Plates, Quaro, and Narvarr Prime armor clipping through Equinox’s shoulders on both of her forms.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Equinox Duality Augment causing the clone to hold their weapon funny if spawned during Pistol + Glaive mode.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Equinox: 100 to 125
Equinox Prime: 120 to 150
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Officium Syandana on Equinox’s Antonym Skin getting wacky positioning when swapping between her Day and Night forms.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.9
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed offsets for Equinox night form leg armor so it sits better on the leg.
Fixed single emissive colors not showing properly on Equinox and Khora.

patchlogs.name: Atlas Prime: Update 25.8.0 + 25.8.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Replaced Arbiters of Hexis Syndicate Sacrifice of Mirage Prime Systems for the Equinox Prime Neuroptics.

patchlogs.name: Arbitrations Revisited: Hotfix 25.7.6
patchlogs.additions: Added “Dayform” and “Nightform” icons beside the emissive color selection in Equinox’s Appearance screen. Choosing a dark or a light color for your emissive will change what form you spawn into mission as -

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.additions: Added Arsenal Ability videos for Chroma, Equinox, and Nezha!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed wonky cloth appearance on some Warframes, like Equinox Prime.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Deluxe: Hotfix 25.5.1 + 25.5.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Subhuti Syandana clipping through Equinox’s Day Form.
Fixed Equinox having an incorrect Ability tip in her Abilities Arsenal screen.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.4.1 + 25.4.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Rathuum/Index not tracking kills done by Umbra or spawned allies (Equinox Duality, etc) when the player is in Operator mode.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Equinox’s Duality Augment clone running off ledges so frequently.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.7.0 + 24.7.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Equinox’s Metamorphosis Ability Day/Night stats being flipped in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Hotfix 24.6.2 + 24.6.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed the sleep abilities of Ivara, Baruuk, and Equinox not giving you the option to capture animals in Plains of Eidolon.

patchlogs.name: Equinox Prime: Hotfix 24.5.8 + 24.5.8.1
patchlogs.changes: Equinox Prime: Hotfix 24.5.8:
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed custom colors not applying to areas of Equinox.
Fixes towards Equinox Prime’s cloth clipping with the Isabeau Prime Syandana.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed clones from Ash’s Blade Storm (Rising Storm) and Equinox’s Metamorphosis Augment (Duality) not using the proper loadout in Dojo Duels as reported here: https://www.reddit.com/r/Warframe/comments/b2hapq/this_is_what_happens_when_you_take_duality/

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.1 + 24.1.1.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed all Equinox Skins not displaying correctly when in Archwing.
Fixed floppy cloth on the Equinox Divisa Helmet dangles.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.1.0 - TennoGen Round 14
patchlogs.changes: Chroma Morkai Skin by lukinu_uEquinox Divisa Skin by HitsuSan Equinox Megaera Skin by Vulbjorn, the graphical walrusGara Zamariu Skin by led2012 and daemonstarLimbo Graxx Skin by FavenNyx Ascophillia Skin by ErneixTitania Lympharis Skin by lukinu_uZephyr Graxx Skin by Faven

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Removed Warframe Ability immunity on animals so that they can be put into a peaceful slumber by special Abilities like Ivara’s Sleep Arrow and Equinox’s Rest.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Hotfix 23.9.1
patchlogs.changes: Updated theme texture icons for all Warframe Skins/Helmets for Ash, Atlas, Banshee, Chroma, Ember and Equinox.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Update 23.5.0
patchlogs.changes:
Switched Equinox's Metamorphosis FX to match the ability outside of Frame Fighter.
Equinox’s Night Form now gives damage reduction and Day Form now gives a Damage buff.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Equinox’s cloth appearing as gray patches while in the Star Chart.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.3 - Limbo Prime
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Equinox Background having the wrong UI Icon when selecting it in the UI Customization screen.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23
patchlogs.changes:
We have also have 2 free Themes specifically tailored for our visually impaired and color blind Tenno: the “Equinox Theme” (B&W theme) and the “High Contrast Theme”! We’d love to get your feedback on them so that we can increase Warframe’s accessibility:
Equinox Background
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed colors not blending correctly into Equinox’s Night form design.
Fixed Specters having trouble aiming at enemies who are not standing upright when using Equinox’s Metamorphosis Duality Augment.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when using Equinox’s Push & Pull Augment Mod.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed t-posing Zephyr when switching from Equinox to Zephyr.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed sleeping enemies (Equinox’s Rest) being alerted when approaching them.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Equinox Clisthert Helmet not applying custom Energy color.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.changes: Converted decimals to whole numbers (e.g. Equinox’s Rest & Rage Wakeup Health Threshold has been changed from 0.5 to 50% for max rank).

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.19.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error when switching modes in your loadout where the Warframe in the previous mode was Chroma/Nidus/Equinox and the Warframe in the new mode is Khora.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.16.0
patchlogs.additions:
Equinox Day-Form Noggle
Equinox Night-Form Noggle
Equinox Combined-Form Noggle

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.12.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when using Transference as Equinox.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Equinox's Night-Form 'Mend' now regenerates Shields of Allies as enemies are killed within range.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Equinox Pacify & Provoke radial FX not being cleaned up on deactivation when on low particle system quality.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.8.0 + Hotfix 22.8.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Equinox's night form not playing nice with Archwing customization colours.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Equinox’s abilities.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: Equinox's Metamorphosis duration reduced to 6 seconds in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a plethora of Syandanas clipping through Equinox’s Insomnia Skin, and Rhino/Rhino Prime. 
Fixed material on the Equinox Insomnia Skin’s helmet to match other Equinox helmets.
Fixed some script errors that could occur if you killed targets affected by Equinox's Rage.
Fixed a crash with Equinox’s Duality Augment.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Equinox Insomnia Skin appearing incorrectly when viewed in the Star Chart.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Equinox Insomnia Skin having an incorrect Helmet tintmask on the Day Form.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.5.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being able to get Equinox's skirt on other Warframes in Captura.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Archwing Power UI displaying the incorrect Powers if the player is Equinox

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.9
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixes towards Equinox’s cloth getting stuck between legs.
Fixed Equinox's mesh being reset to the mixed form when previewing Helmets/Skins/etc in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed clipping issues with Equinox’s front cloths.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Equinox’s front cloths from clipping.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed not being able to press the Warframe specific option in Appearance submenu of Arsenal (Mandachord for Bard, Metamorphosis for Equinox etc...) when Arsenal is opened by Operator.

patchlogs.name: The Pacifism Defect: Hotfix 19.12.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Equinox (and possibly Chroma) appearing to have a full grown Cyst when in reality it's not mature and ready for curing. 
Fixed Equinox’s Agile and Noble stance not applying when holding a Bow.

patchlogs.name: The Pacifism Defect: Hotfix 19.12.1+19.12.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Equinox’s Noble/Agile animations not functioning properly with the Javlok.

patchlogs.name: Banshee Prime: Hotfix 19.11.5 + 19.11.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Equinox changing forms when Focus is activated.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.11.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed rounding in Equinox’s Pacify and Provoke HUD indicator (was truncating not rounding).

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.6.0 + 19.6.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Equinox’s Metamorphosis ability.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.5.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash caused by Equinox’s Metamorphosis ability.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Equinox’s Metamorphosis

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a script error when casting Equinox’s Metamorphosis ability. 
Fixed finishers not triggering Equinox’s Rest & Rage's Augment, Calm & Frenzy, to spread as Host as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/701225-calm-frenzy-covert-lethality-broken-as-host/

patchlogs.name: The Vacuum Within: Hotfix #3
patchlogs.changes:
Moved Nyx’ Absorb damage counter up to the buff notification area (like Equinox' Maim damage counter).
Made Equinox’ Maim damage counter show up immediately (as zero) so that you can tell you've cast it even when there are no enemies in range.

patchlogs.name: The Vacuum Within: Hotfix #2
patchlogs.changes: Compacted large numbers for some ability notifications on the HUD (eg: Equinox’s Maim).

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.changes: Equinox’s Rest & Rage range reduced in Conclave

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Hotfix 13
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the duration of Equinox's Metamorphosis in Conclave

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes: Equinox

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.13.3
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed a gradual decrease in performance that could occur in long duration missions if a player cast Equinox's Metamorphosis ability while having a Sigil equipped.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.13.0: TennoGen, Passives, & Reworks
patchlogs.changes: •    Added a HUD Power Strength buff indicator for Equinox’s Provoke ability.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.10.4 Operation Rathuum.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Ki'Teer Syandana placing incorrectly on Equinox as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/637842-equinox-and-kiteer-syandana/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash that would occur when randomizing Equinox’s appearance.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.5.5 + 18.5.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed Equinox turning all white when using Metamorphosis to switch from Day to Night form.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Equinox Metamorphosis Conclave Augment 
Equinox’s Rest & Rage will now slow boss-type enemies instead of putting them to sleep.
Fixed an issue with Equinox’s visual Ability FX lingering for too long.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.changes: Lowered the damage of Equinox’s Maim Ability in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes: Equinox

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Equinox’s Conclave Mobility not being properly normalized, and Equinox’s Movement Speed being adjusted by mistake.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Equinox’s Mend & Maim visual FX not properly displaying if the player is stealthed while the Ability is active.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Targets affected by Ivara’s Slumber Arrow will now wake up early if their health drops below 50% (just like Equinox's Rest).

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes:
Targets affected by Equinox’s Rest will be immune to damage for 1 second on Wake, there is no immunity if Rest expires naturally.
Increased damage and speed bonus of Equinox's Metamorphosis Day Form in PvP.
Increased radius of Equinox's Pacify & Provoke aura in PvP.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an error that would cause changing the color customization of an Archwing to also change the color customizations on Equinox.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.12.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Equinox’s Rest & Rage Ability ending early when switching forms as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/552607-equinoxs-rest-and-rage-are-canceled-when-switching-forms/

patchlogs.name: Update 17.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Equinox’s cloth dangles appearing on other Warframes after selecting a Conclave loadout as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/512961-fusion/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.5.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Chroma and Equinox's Energy colour not properly affecting states in PvP matches.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.5.3
patchlogs.changes: Equinox's 4th Ability has had its energy drain-per-second changed from 5 to 3.5

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes:
Equinox’s Rest & Rage has had its base range doubled.
Overhealing from Equinox’s Mend will now restore shields.
Switching between forms with Equinox has been reduced to a 1 second delay.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Equinox’s Maim doing damage to the player when deactivated on a Rampart.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.changes: • Power Efficiency Mods now apply to Equinox’s Pacify and Provoke.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.5
patchlogs.changes:
Targets put to sleep by Equinox will be invulnerable until awakened.
Players that did not receive a unique helmet for Equinox has been given a helmet retroactively.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed visual issues with attachments on Equinox’s Day-form.
Fixed typos visible in Equinox’s Day and Night Systems description in the Foundry.
Fixed players not being able to equip Arcane Enhancements Equinox’s Helmet.  This fix only corrects on newly crafted helmets -

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.3
patchlogs.changes:
Duration increased of Equinox’s Rest in PvP.
The first hit on a Target that is affected by Equinox’s Rest does no damage and wakes them up in PvP.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Equinox sliding instead of jogging when using Rest/Rage while moving.
Fixed Equinox being able to heal Defense objectives.
Fixed Equinox’s Mend HUD buff indicator not going away if you then use Metamorphosis.
Fixed the Harkonar Syandana not sitting properly on Equinox when in Night-form.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Clients seeing Equinox using the wrong idle animations on Night and Day forms.
Fixed one Aspect of Equinox requiring two helmets, instead of a helmet, chassis and systems.
Fixed the positioning of the new ‘cape’ Syandanas on Equinox.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes:
There is so much to explore in this massive, new update! Move through the Solar System in an entirely new way with a completely overhauled Parkour system. Visit an underwater world with new Archwing levels. Go on a Quest for the new Equinox Warframe and discover the best of both worlds. Experience an abundance of new Conclave additions, Weapons, Mods and more!
Split between day and night, Equinox manifests aggressive and defensive forms at will.  Equinox’s powers include:
